name: Corn Meal Herb Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In the order given, add all ingredients to the bread machine.
2. Select White bread setting and push Start.
Note: The crunchy texture of the corn meal in the top crust is a highlight. The herbs provide an excellent fragrance during baking and a delightful flavor once cooked. Serve warm with sweet butter. Makes 1 loaf, approximately 8 slices. Each slice contains 141 calories; less than 1 gram dietary fiber; less than 1 gram soluble fiber; 26 grams carbohydrates; 4 grams protein; 2 grams fat (14% of calories from fat); 0 milligrams cholesterol; 246 milligrams sodium; 67 milligrams potassium; 9 milligrams calcium.
